title: ANIMAL SERVICES - 211info
text: PAWS ANIMAL SHELTER ANIMAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a no-kill animal shelter specializing in care for orphaned, homeless, and newborn animals. Animals are screened for diseases on intake. Offers adoption and foster opportunities. The shelter has limited capacity and services may not always be available. In these instances, shelter staff may still be able to provide information or assist in directing to other available services in the community. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Animal Adoption Animal Shelters Foster Care/Temporary Shelter for Animals Specialized Information and Referral * Pets If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
